name: equal_weight_reposition_vs_statusquo
description: Olympus #32 reference risk allocation: equal-weight 1/N BTC/SPY/GLD/TLT with quarterly rebalance, retained as a paper-only diversified-beta risk reference after failing robust OOS edge gates.
label: diversified beta, unvalidated, regime-dependent OOS

reference_default.honest_value: risk-management reference: lower drawdown and better downside-adjusted profile than concentrated BTC in #31 full-sample evidence
reference_default.boundary: not a verified alpha or robust OOS edge; diversification versus concentration is regime-dependent and regime prediction was not validated

promotion_policy: reference-only; any move beyond manual backtest or paper monitoring requires a separate explicit user decision and must not bypass live gates, autonomous decision gates, or promotion gates
